testcase.name: bridgeDown
testcase.system-out:
18:59:40.517 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.ledgeragent.api.ApiControllerIT]: ApiControllerIT does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:59:40.564 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.ledgeragent.LedgerAgentApplication for test class com.ledgeragent.api.ApiControllerIT . ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/
:: Spring Boot :: (v3.3.0)
2026-05-14T18:59:40.682-05:00 INFO 18619 --- [ledger-agent-webapp] [ main] com.ledgeragent.api.ApiControllerIT : Starting ApiControllerIT using Java 21.0.10 with PID 18619 (started by vn53fda in /Users/vn53fda/Downloads/TinyProject/ledger-agent/webapp) 2026-05-14T18:59:40.682-05:00 INFO 18619 --- [ledger-agent-webapp] [ main] com.ledgeragent.api.ApiControllerIT : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-05-14T18:59:41.483-05:00 INFO 18619 --- [ledger-agent-webapp] [ main] com.ledgeragent.api.ApiControllerIT : Started ApiControllerIT in 0.9 seconds (process running for 1.436)
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/vn53fda/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.14.16/byte-buddy-agent-1.14.16.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: bridgeException
